name: NutriAI
industry: Nutrition & health tech — AI calorie/macro tracking and meal planning app

brandVoice.about: NutriAI is an AI nutrition app that meets people where they already eat. It logs and plans meals with USDA-verified macros and calories (the AI never invents the numbers — they're resolved deterministically from food data), learns each person's real eating routine over time, and turns intent into accuracy. Core capabilities: fast logging (barcode, voice, quick-add), AI meal plans you can save to a personal Recipe Vault, pantry-aware shopping lists, a vault-aware assistant (NutriBot), and GLP-1 support. It's local-first and private — the app works with no account, and your data stays yours. The promise isn't a diet to follow; it's honest numbers and less friction on the way you already eat.
brandVoice.audience: People who take nutrition seriously and want accuracy over fads: macro-trackers and meal-preppers, GLP-1 users managing appetite and protein, busy people who already know how they eat and just want the numbers and less logging, and privacy-conscious users who don't want a cloud account to track their food.
dos: lead with accuracy and honesty — verified macros, real data
respect the routine people already have; help, don't lecture
be concrete and specific (real features, real numbers when provided)
use plain, calm language a non-expert understands
emphasize privacy and local-first (works with no account)
be encouraging and judgement-free about food choices
donts: shame, guilt, or moralize about food ('good'/'bad' foods, 'cheat' meals)
fabricate statistics, study results, or medical claims
give individualized medical or clinical advice
overpromise — describe what the app actually does
samplePosts: You already know what you eat. NutriAI just tells you the macros behind it — verified, not guessed.
Log a meal by voice or barcode in seconds. Save the ones you make often to your Vault and re-log them in a tap.
Your food data, your device. NutriAI works with no account — local-first by default.
On a GLP-1? NutriAI keeps protein front and center while appetite is low — and adapts as your routine changes.
Meal plans that learn from what you actually cook, not a template someone else picked for you.
